hibernate-mapping.query: Select wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Paycheck.Company.Id, count(wcpps.id) From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.WorkersCompPaycheckPendingState as wcpps Where wcpps.StateCd in ('PendingNew', 'PendingDelete', 'PendingEdit') Group by wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Paycheck.Company.Id

Select wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Paycheck.Company.Id, count(wcpps.id) From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.WorkersCompPaycheckPendingState as wcpps, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.WcCompany as wc, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp Where wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Paycheck.Company=comp and wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Paycheck.Company=wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Company and comp=wc.Company and wcpps.StateCd in ('PendingNew', 'PendingDelete', 'PendingEdit') and wc.SubsTypeCd in ('SplitLimit') Group by wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Paycheck.Company.Id

Select wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Paycheck.Company.Id, count(wcpps.id) From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.WorkersCompPaycheckPendingState as wcpps, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.WcCompany as wc Where comp=wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Paycheck.Company and wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Paycheck.Company=wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Company and comp=wc.Company and wcpps.StateCd in ('PendingNew', 'PendingDelete', 'PendingEdit') and wc.SubsTypeCd in ('Next') Group by wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Paycheck.Company.Id

SELECT wcpps FROM com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.WorkersCompPaycheckPendingState as wcpps left join fetch wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck as wcp left join fetch wcp.Paycheck as pc left join fetch pc.SourceEmployee se left join fetch pc.PayrollRun left join fetch pc.Company as c left join fetch c.LegalAddress WHERE c.Id in (:companyIds) and wcpps.StateCd in ('PendingNew', 'PendingDelete', 'PendingEdit') ORDER BY wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck.Paycheck.Company

SELECT wcpps.Id FROM com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.WorkersCompPaycheckPendingState as wcpps inner join wcpps.WorkersCompPaycheck as wcp inner join wcp.Paycheck as pc inner join pc.PayrollRun as prun left join pc.Company as c WHERE wcp.Company=pc.Company and c.Id in (:companyIds) and prun.PaycheckDate <= (:currentDate) and wcpps.StateCd in (:subsCode)

SELECT distinct comp.SourceCompanyId FROM com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.WcCompany as wc, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp WHERE cs.Company=wc.Company and comp=cs.Company and wc.SubsTypeCd in (:subsCode) and wc.SubsEndDate < (:currentDate) and cs.StatusCd in ('ActiveCurrent') and cs.Service in ('WorkersComp')

SELECT wcp FROM com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.WorkersCompPaycheck as wcp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as pay, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as c, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as prun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.WcCompany as wc Where c=wc.Company and wcp.Company=pay.Company and pay.Company=c and pay=wcp.Paycheck and prun=pay.PayrollRun and prun.PaycheckDate <= (:currentDate) and wcp.CurrentStateCd in ('PendingDelete', 'PendingEdit') and wc.SubsTypeCd in ('SplitLimit')
